summary: Iteration 2 (auth + testimonials + WhatsApp + logo + SEO + real contact) tested end-to-end. Backend: 14/14 pytest cases pass (login success/wrong/case-insensitive, /auth/me with/without/invalid token, protected GET /enquiries requires Bearer token, public POST /enquiries still works and persists, invalid car_type -> 400, created enquiry visible to admin, root health). Frontend: /admin without token redirects to /admin/login (form visible), wrong creds show 'Invalid email or password' toast and stay on login, correct creds (admin@gmail.com / Cleandrive24) navigate to /admin, cd_admin_token stored, admin-page and enquiries render, admin-logout-button clears token and redirects to /admin/login. Testimonials section (testimonial-card-0..3) and WhatsApp floating button visible. Footer shows real phone (+91 99251 51405), real email (info@thecleandrive.in), Instagram href correct. EnquiryForm shows real phone at enquiry-phone. Choose Plan -> prefill regression still works. Header logo (/cleandrive-logo-white.png) rendered.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'); consider migrating to lifespan handler in FastAPI (informational, not blocking).
CORS is set to allow_origins='*' with allow_credentials=True — currently harmless since auth is Bearer (not cookies), but browsers ignore credentials with wildcard origins; safe for now.
test_create_public_no_auth returns the created id (PytestReturnNotNoneWarning). Non-functional, but the test should assert instead of return.
seed_data_creation: Created two TEST_ prefixed enquiries via public POST /api/enquiries during pytest run
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 fully green. Bearer JWT auth (localStorage key cd_admin_token), admin seed idempotent, protected list_enquiries, public create. New sections wired with testids: testimonials-section, testimonial-card-0..3, whatsapp-float-button, footer-phone, footer-email, social-instagram, enquiry-phone, admin-login-form, admin-email-input, admin-password-input, admin-login-submit, admin-page, admin-logout-button, admin-refresh-button.
